headline: Devon Energy (DVN) Price Target Lowered at Raymond James. Here is Why
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is included among the 12 Best American Oil Stocks to Buy Now. Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is a leading US oil and gas producer with a premier multi-basin portfolio touching the Anadarko Basin, Eagle Ford, Marcellus Shale, Powder River Basin, Williston Basin, and anchored by a world-class acreage position in the […]
